title: Bridge Essay: Neuroscience of the yogic theory of consciousness.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Heat/Fire** (Phase 3) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Heat/Fire to mechanistic neuroscience through Neuroscience, of, the, yogic, theory.

**Neuroscience of the yogic theory of consciousness.** — Neurosci Conscious. PMID: 34925910. DOI: 10.1093/nc/niab030. Yoga as apractice and philosophy of life has been followed for more than 4500 years with known evidence of yogic practices in the Indus Valley Civilization. The last few decades have seen aresurgence in the utility of yoga and meditation as apractice with growing scientific evidence behind it. Significant scientific literature has been published, illustrating the benefits of yogic practices including 'asana', 'pranayama' and 'dhyana' on mental and physical well-being.
